headlines.title: How Rayner, Streeting and Burnham weakened PM in 12 hours of political drama
headlines.description: Three interventions by three senior Labour politicians made for an unforgettable day in British politics.

headlines.title: Trump warns Taiwan against declaring independence, hours after summit with China's Xi
headlines.description: The US president says he wants Beijing and Taipei to "cool down" tensions over the self-governing island.

headlines.title: Thousands of officers deployed as crowds gather for London protests
headlines.description: The Metropolitan Police has called the operation to police rival marches, one organised by Tommy Robinson and a separate pro-Palestinian protest, as one of the most significant in recent years.

headlines.title: Switzerland to open secret files on Auschwitz 'Angel of Death' Mengele
headlines.description: Mengele fled Europe after the war but for years there were rumours he spent time in Switzerland.

headlines.title: What China critics in Maga movement make of Trump's Beijing trip
headlines.description: Trump’s softer approach towards China is one that experts say will likely trickle down to the wider MAGA base.

headlines.title: Eurovision final: Sex, violins and seven other things to look out for
headlines.description: A guide to the stand-out moments of Eurovision 2026, ahead of Saturday night's final in Vienna.

headlines.title: I tried the UK's 'saltiest' sandwich - here's what I learned
headlines.description: Health correspondent James Gallagher absorbs more than the recommended daily limit in just one meal to find out how salt affects our bodies.

headlines.title: 'They took £20,000 I didn't owe': Parents hit by child maintenance errors
headlines.description: John Hammond is one of 30 parents who told BBC Your Voice they'd experienced problems with the CMS.

headlines.title: What is a 'safe death'? Mentally ill woman asks for assisted dying in Canada
headlines.description: Canada has twice delayed access to medically assisted dying for those with mental illness. Claire Brosseau says she cannot wait any longer and wants the courts to decide.

headlines.title: Alleged murder of Aboriginal girl highlights Australia's deep inequalities
headlines.description: Her death has sparked outrage across Australia and intense debate about disparities in society.

headlines.title: Eurovision is almost here! But how much do you know about Europe's biggest pop spectacular?
headlines.description: Are you the ultimate Eurovision superfan? Take our quiz to find out

headlines.title: Man killed by 13ft great white shark in Western Australia
headlines.description: The man was bitten just before 10:00 (03:00 BST) at Horseshoe Reef - north-west of the popular Rottnest Island near the city of Perth, local police said.

headlines.title: Teen e-biker jailed for killing gran on zebra crossing
headlines.description: Billy Stokoe is detained for causing the death by dangerous driving of Gloria Stephenson.

headlines.title: The Papers: 'Burnham will push to be next PM' and 'Dosh and Becks'
headlines.description: Andy Burnham entering the race to become the next prime minister is the focus of today's papers.

headlines.title: British firm vying to build next Red Arrows jets collapses
headlines.description: Aeralis was hoping the UK government would award it a contract to replace the Hawk jets currently flown by the RAF.

headlines.title: Senior IS leader killed by US and Nigerian forces
headlines.description: US President Donald Trump said the joint operation eliminated "the most active terrorist in the world", Abu-Bilal al-Minuki.

headlines.title: Spring warmth set to return with 26C forecast next week
headlines.description: After feeling pretty cold with heavy showers and hail, the weather is picking up with a return to some spring warmth next week, as Simon King explains

headlines.title: Would FA Cup win paper over the cracks for Chelsea?
headlines.description: Chelsea have endured a difficult campaign after the departure of two managers and protests among the fanbase - so  what would an FA Cup win do for their season?

headlines.title: What Makerfield thinks of by-election - and if Burnham can win
headlines.description: Andy Burnham says he will look to stand in the constituency, after Labour MP Josh Simons announces his resignation.

headlines.title: Judge declares another mistrial in Harvey Weinstein New York rape case
headlines.description: It marks the third time a New York jury has considered the case against the 74-year-old disgraced film mogul.

headlines.title: Lebanon says six killed in Israeli strike as US announces ceasefire extension
headlines.description: President Trump announced the truce last month, but Israel and Hezbollah have continued to exchange fire since then.

headlines.title: Teenager's family 'heartbroken' by meningitis death
headlines.description: The family of sixth form pupil Lewis Waters post a tribute following his death.

headlines.title: US planning to criminally indict ex-Cuban leader Raúl Castro
headlines.description: Charges could come as soon as next week in a case reportedly focused on Cuba's downing of two planes in 1996.

headlines.title: Giant new dinosaur identified from fossils in Thailand
headlines.description: The nagatitan is the largest dinosaur found in South-East Asia and weighs as much as nine elephants.

headlines.title: Boy, 9, aims to become youngest amputee to complete Three Peaks challenge
headlines.description: Albie-Junior Thomas hopes to scale the UK's three highest peaks in 24 hours wearing a prosthetic.

headlines.title: New bypass named Pork Pie Way in ‘defining moment for Melton Mowbray’
headlines.description: Animal rights charity Peta says the name for the new road was "pig-demeaning".

headlines.title: I became my sister's carer at six - she amazes me every day
headlines.description: Vicky Lilly refuses to let her disability get in the way of her independence.

headlines.title: BBC News app

headlines.title: Why Democrats are panicking about losing California
headlines.description: Has America’s largest state become ungovernable?

headlines.title: A cross-cultural rom-com about an assisted marriage
headlines.description: Her best friend's journey into marriage, challenges Zoe's own attitude toward relationships

headlines.title: 'We crumbled' - another loss, another unwanted record for leaky Liverpool
headlines.description: Arne Slot says his Liverpool side "crumbled" during their thumping defeat by Aston Villa, as the pressure on him continues to mount.

headlines.description: Northern Ireland's Rory McIlroy drags himself back into contention as Aronimink continues to punish the world's best golfers at the US PGA Championship.

headlines.title: Celtic & Hearts set for titanic title duel
headlines.description: A remarkable Scottish Premiership campaign concludes with Hearts and Celtic going head-to-head for the title on Saturday.

headlines.title: Northampton humiliate Bristol 94-33 in record-breaking game
headlines.description: Northampton scores 14 tries to humiliate Bristol Bears 94-33 at Franklin's Gardens and confirm their semi-final place in a record-breaking game of Prem Rugby.

headlines.title: The engineer missing his shift at Wembley... to play there instead
headlines.description: Engineer Jay Lovell was set to be working at Wembley on Sunday, but instead he will be playing there in the FA Vase final.

headlines.title: Would FA Cup win paper over the cracks for Chelsea?
headlines.description: Chelsea have endured a difficult campaign after the departure of two managers and protests among the fanbase - so  what would an FA Cup win do for their season?

headlines.title: How Doku became key player for treble-chasing Man City
headlines.description: Jeremy Doku is likely to be a key player as Man City face Chelsea in Saturday's FA Cup final. BBC Sport looks at the winger's rise.
